title: Blood Environment
description:
this pack completely change the Minecraft in the from of blood theme texture pack
version from 1.16 to latest
body:
This is the texture pack aka resource pack "Blood Environment"
this pack completely change the Minecraft in the from of blood theme
this a theme based texture pack.

###### Optifine required######
otherwise this pack doesn't work properly.

this pack is created to support all kind of horror adventure theme Minecraft.

 

changes in Minecraft after applying the pack.

changes are:-

1)water
2)sky
3)end sky
4)ice
5)blue ice
6)packed ice
7)grass
8)sugar cane
9)leaf
10)rain
11)sun
12)moon
13)cloud
14)grass block
15)dead bush
16)end portal
17)nether portal
18)vines
19)particles
20)water bucket
21)beacon
22)beacon beam
23)leaves
24)saplings
25)cactus
26)dead bush
27)wheat plant
28)kelp
29)seagrass
30)particles
31)bamboo
32)bamboo leaves
33)cave vines
34)lily pad
35)moss block
36)dripleaf
37)sweet berry bush

38)snow

 

this pack is good for role play videos
horror adventure videos

this pack is supported both single player world and multiplayer servers.

 

version supported
form- 1.16 to latest

 

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files

 

Enjoy the "Blood Environment".

 

THANKS FOR DOWNLOADING.
